title: Composition Contract Inventory And Fixture Capture

vakBaseline.source: epi agent vak evaluate --json "Composition Contract Inventory And Fixture Capture"
vakBaseline.rationale: Composition is dialectical synthesis (CF (0/1/2)) between the six individual extensions delivered by Track 07 and the integrated 1-2-3 / 4-5-0 plugins.

integratedPlugins.purpose: Cosmic Engine composition slice — single profile stream, Anuttara prior-ground reference, integrated 1-2-3 cosmic spine carrying 137 = 64 + 72 + 1 only at M1/M2/M3 (NOT M0).
Privacy-first composition: M4 protected-local field + M5 review/consent + M0 prior-ground graph. Jiva-is-Siva recognition surface with hard protected-local boundary.

contractShapes.rule: All composition contract shapes live as one shared module imported by both integrated plugins and the ide-shell-m0-m5 chrome extension. No integrated plugin redefines these locally.

shapes.name: IntegratedSurfaceContribution
shapes.purpose: What a Track 07 individual extension contributes to a Track 08 integrated plugin (view part(s), inspector(s), evidence producer, layout claim, readiness).

shapes.name: IntegratedViewPart
shapes.purpose: A renderable region contributed by a single extension into the integrated composition (graph view, oracle pane, cymatic surface, etc.).

shapes.name: IntegratedMiniInspector
shapes.purpose: The reduced-mode inspector contract an individual extension exposes while the integrated plugin is active (per Theia plan: individual extensions inhibited or operate in mini-mode).

shapes.name: IntegratedEvidenceProducer
shapes.purpose: Names which S5 review/autoresearch deposits this extension may emit through the composition, with required evidence fields.

shapes.name: IntegratedLayoutClaim
shapes.purpose: Layout slot + size hint + priority + persistence flag the extension claims when contributing. Arbitrated by the shared composition coordinator.

shapes.name: IntegratedReadiness
shapes.purpose: Typed readiness for the composition as a whole; aggregates each contributor's readiness over the same taxonomy used by Track 07.

fixturePayloadRequirements.rule: Fixture tests must parse payloads captured from real upstream services or upstream contract tests. Handwritten happy-path JSON alone is not accepted as readiness evidence.

track_01_S0_kernel.MathemeHarmonicProfile_safe_public_curre: Body/S/S0/portal-core/contract-inventory/baseline-profile.json (real-code generated by Track 01 T0 fixture test).

track_02_S2_graph.filtered_subgraph: captured via Body/S/S2/graph-services/tests/graph_api_contract.rs + namespace-aware live test when EPI_GRAPH_LIVE=1
track_02_S2_graph.GDS_overlay: blocked until Track 02 T6 (IOD-07 n10s/GDS packaging unresolved)

track_03_S3_gateway_spacetimedb.world_clock_delta: blocked until Track 03 T3 native SpaceTimeDB WebSocket completion
track_03_S3_gateway_spacetimedb.session_DAY_NOW_handle: captured via epi gate session.patch RPC (commit 19fbc8fc carries vak_address)

track_04_S5_review_autoresearch.review_DTO: blocked until Track 04 T6-T7 (M5-3 contract surface)
track_04_S5_review_autoresearch.promotion_dry_run_plan: blocked permanently for non-dry-run until compiler mutation law (DSD-03)

compatibilityMatrix.rule: Names which fields each integrated plugin needs, which upstream track owns them, and what readiness state appears when absent. Per-extension internals are Track 07-owned and explicitly out of scope here.

needs.field: M0 prior-ground graph (Anuttara graph view, namespace=bimba)
M4 protected-local Nara field (NEVER over public bridge — protected-local capability only)
S5.review_inbox + canon-recognition gates + Jiva-is-Siva recognition envelope
M4 day episodes + oracle artifacts (only safe handles via Graphiti protected-handle API)

sharedRules: Both integrated plugins consume S0/S2/S3/S5 only through the same shared KernelBridgeAPI adapter declared in 07-t0-extension-contract-preflight.json#sharedBridgeAdapter — Track 08 does NOT introduce a parallel bridge.
No integrated plugin imports raw S0/S2/S3/S5/SpaceTimeDB/neo4j/redis/portal-core/epii-review-core modules directly — same forbidden-import set as 07.T0.

Composition orchestration lives in Body/M/epi-theia/shared (favored over per-plugin-package or ide-shell ownership) to avoid divergent layout arbitration — see track-08.composition-ownership open decision.
M4 protected-local body NEVER enters the integrated 4/5/0 composition — only opaque Graphiti handles + S5 review evidence.
Alpha 137 = 64 + 72 + 1 teaching belongs to the integrated 1-2-3 cosmic spine (M1/M2/M3), NOT to plugin-integrated-4-5-0 — M0 remains prior ground.
Tracks 07-owned per-extension internals are explicitly NOT contracted by 08.T0 — Track 08 only contracts the composition seam.

openDecisions.summary: Workspace-mode vs command-view activation — named workspace layouts vs command-opened meta-views vs both. Affects persistence, deep links, layout conflict.
Concrete mini-inspector contract for individual extensions while integrated plugin active — proposed by Track 08, must be confirmed by Track 07.
Composition orchestration lives in each integrated plugin / shared composition extension / ide-shell-m0-m5 chrome — shared service favored.
1 Hz world_clock vs 250 ms visual interpolation vs high-freq audio/cymatic vs S5 review cadence — production cadence model unresolved.
Tauri/Theia bridge host boundary — integrated plugin code targets stable API, but performance/privacy depend on host.
Epii city-scape: literal architecture vs stylized geometric abstraction — prototype both before settling.
M4 field Option F full physics vs stylized fallback — render readiness honestly if only fallback available.
4/5/0 must NOT assume user-personal GDS overlays until Track 02/M4 supplies privacy-safe model.
M0 vs M1 +1 attribution unresolved — route 137 teaching to M1/M2/M3 spine; keep M0 as prior ground until canon decides.
alpha_quaternionic_integration has no Section 18 heading per M0'-SPEC note — cite Section 11 + M4 field-engine Section 18 instead.

contract_tests: Future implementation-branch test must import the six Track 07 individual extension contribution stubs and reject any IntegratedSurfaceContribution missing privacyClass, readiness, or layoutClaims.
Fixture tests must parse real upstream payloads (or upstream contract test outputs) — handwritten happy-path JSON alone is NOT accepted.
Compatibility-matrix tests must explicitly mark Track 07-owned per-extension internals as out of scope for Track 08.

readinessBlockersCarriedForward.summary: Track 07 source files not present in worktree at planning time; 08 marks per-extension contribution details as a dependency, not as settled.
Mini-inspector contract proposed but not confirmed.
Kernel-bridge host boundary affects integrated composition performance/privacy.
n10s/GDS packaging/persistence unresolved — affects 1-2-3 GDS overlay.
Non-dry-run promotion blocked until compiler mutation law.
